idea.description: Travel for students | Entertainment | Marketplace via browser_extension | Subscription | Global market

landing_page.headline: Discover Your Next Adventure Without Breaking the Bank
landing_page.subheadline: AI-powered travel planning and exclusive student deals delivered right to your browser. Find flights, accommodation, and entertainment all in one place.
features: AI chat assistant finds personalized student travel deals in seconds
Built-in marketplace with discounts on flights, hostels, and experiences
Entertainment hub with travel content, tips, and student community stories
Automatic price alerts and fare tracking across 500+ travel sites
Seamless browser extension works while you study or browse

friction_points: Zero savings runway - no financial cushion
No free time to actually travel (0 hours/day)
Basic financial survival takes priority over discretionary spending
simulations.reasoning: With $0 monthly income and $0 discretionary budget, I cannot afford any paid product right now - even something as inexpensive as $4/month. Travel planning is a luxury I simply cannot consider when I have no income at all. This isn't a pricing issue; it's a fundamental financial survival situation.
simulations.competing_with: basic living expenses and financial stability

simulations.reasoning: As a student with $0 monthly income and $0 discretionary budget, I cannot afford any paid subscription even at $4/month. Additionally, I have zero free time to actually use this service. The travel deals are irrelevant when I have no money to travel and no time to plan trips.
